title: EverlaArtifacts
description: Custom rainbow name and lore support and a bunch of other stuff
body:
_Firearms shatter crystals, currents deflect dragon’s breath, names glow in rainbow hues. Yet your relentless pursuit of Minecraft’s limits is the true ultimate weapon._

**This mod offers a collection of fun/reference‑themed items, several entertaining enchantments, a vast array of music discs, and a handful of the author's own creative ideas.**

And there’s more…

Additionally, this mod enables the Mekasuit to defend against most attacks from the Chaos Guardian in Draconic Evolution.

At the same time, TACZ firearms can now effectively break the Chaos Crystals of the Chaos Guardian and penetrate its own shields.

**Beyond that, this mod implements rainbow‑colored item name rendering and supports rainbow‑colored lore text.**

Using these features is straightforward:


For colored names, simply add the item to the tag 
```
everlaartifacts:rainbow_name
```


For colored lore, first add the item to the tag
```
 everlaartifacts:rainbow_lore
```


then write your key in the language file:


```
text.rainbow_lore.<mod_namespace>.<item_id>
```

and provide the localized text for that key, e.g.:


```
§mHee hee hee ha\n§r§oThis is an item
```


**Colored descriptions support formatting via the § symbol, but line breaks must use the \n escape sequence. Vanilla 16-color support based on § codes was added in Beta 2.0.0.26.7.**

**For version 2.0.0.26.8 and above, you can make tools or armor unbreakable by adding the**


```
everlaartifacts:everlasting
```


**tag to them.**

**Note: In early development, this mod used MCreator to quickly add items. It has since moved away from MCreator—no need to worry about performance issues.**

_"Can I include this mod in my modpack?"_

**Of course—feel free.**

**Technoblade Never Dies!!!!**
